title: Proof Techniques, Invariants, and Recurrence Bounds · Structure Brief: Contradiction Exchange
summary: Review a proposed optimization whose runtime and correctness claims lack evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 contradiction exchange increment in a formal algorithm review packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use contradiction and exchange arguments where direct construction is awkward.
State initialization, maintenance, and termination for nontrivial loop invariants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
